mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, selected_color, selected_size, quantity, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{selectedColor}, #{selectedSize}, #{quantity}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, selected_color, selected_size, quantity, created_at, updated_at FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND COALESCE(selected_color, '') = COALESCE(#{selectedColor}, '') AND COALESCE(selected_size, '') = COALESCE(#{selectedSize}, '') LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET quantity = #{quantity}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE cart SET quantity = quantity + #{add}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, selected_color, selected_size, quantity, created_at, updated_at FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM cart WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.product_id, p.name, p.image_url, p.price, p.original_price, c.selected_color, c.selected_size, c.quantity FROM cart c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.product_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
